title: Sculk And Jaw
description: This mod expanded sculk blocks family and add few new effects, Ancient City and Deep Dark is more dangerous now.
body:
# Sculk&Jaw

**Sculk&Jaw** mod expanded sculk blocks family and added few new effects.  
Deep Dark and Ancient City have become even more dangerous--be extra careful when exploring!

## Sculk Jaw

![Sculk Jaw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a627792b2c7765839d05c76b34231e7e6c8d47f1.png)

Naturally generates in the Deep Dark biome and Ancient City structures.  
Will attack creatures that accidentally step on it. If the creature is small enough, it will be swallowed into its stomach within a few seconds.  
Creatures that remain inside the Sculk Jaw for too long will continuously take Acid Etching effect damage and gain increasingly higher levels of the Sculkophobia effect.  
When got caught by a Sculk Jaw, try to climb up and get out of its stomach, do not forget to sneak out or else it will drag you in again.  
Will eat and storage items dropped on top of it, you can retrieve them by breaking the block (**Silk Touch** recommended).  
Can only be obtained intact with the Silk Touch enchantment.  
Can be filled with a bucket of Sculk Acid to make it more dangerous or just as a trash can, when filled with Sculk Acid, it will directly destroy anything into its mouth.  
Can be used to brew Sculk Acid potions.

![Sculk Jaw Acid Filled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28962c48909a3937e37198fe7a87a8abce97f58b.png)

When filled with Sculk Acid, it will no longer bite creatures, but will damage them with Acid Etching effect when they step into it.

## Concentrated Sculk

![Concentrated Sculk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08b8351d0a4508a5292b5a57fe1ba3072073f877.png)

Can be crafted on a Crafting Table using the following recipe.  
![recipe of Concentrated Sculk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9429fb456bf857cc15a29f847dbe8a5b9a37006.png)

It will generate Sculk Catalyst on top with sculk charge, which makes Sculk Catalyst more easy to regenerate.  
![sculk spreading](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11e3bdbc16dc057445fad9335dee1272d98a2657_0.webp)

Can only be obtained intact with the Silk Touch enchantment.

## Combined Sculk Jaw

![Combined Sculk Jaw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1086541e33c1dc29ae9c3c9711b2dfb3becf082.png)

Try to combine a Sculk Jaw with a Concentrated Sculk in your mob farm.  
It will store experiences dropped by mobs it killed, and you can retrieve them by breaking the block (**Silk Touch** recommended).  
Can only be obtained intact with the Silk Touch enchantment.

## Sculk Acid

![Sculk Acid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d78a4c1406b699d4754f8d8a31bba67ae3883a8d.png)

A new fluid that can be collected with Sculk Acid potions and Cauldrons, it also gives Acid Etching effect to mobs step into it.  
Try to fill a Cauldron with Sculk Acid potions and pick it up with a bucket.

## Sculk Acid Potions

You can brew Sculk Acid potions using Sculk Jaw and water bottles, also have its splash and lingering variants.

![sculk_acid_potion_brewing_1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83bb39b953fdc1f186feab1192b06a415c049955.png)
![sculk_acid_potion_brewing_2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ddc116dcc71383ae4775914a9d8abf7416abf11.png)
![sculk_acid_potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08bf403339da5b5ab69928bcea74504a931c236b.png)

## Acid Etching

It will be safe as long as my armor have not be broken… right?

![acid_etching](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6737c725052b28f6e5848e413c6e541118b8a7b.png)

A new effect that will reduce 2 points of armor per level, and will continuously damage your health.

## Sculkophobia

Anyone who has experienced this kind of pain does not want to recall this feeling.

![Sculkophobia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21a4d8179a3213b2f4b5697ba7705a61ffa4dbd9.png)

A new effect that will reduce 2 points of max health per level.  
Sculk tentacles will surround your field of view.

![ancient city](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20614d82fae0c81fca2cec1780e80da90e8fbd72_0.webp)

**This mod was made for our lost block: Sculk Jaw in 1.19**

**Special thanks for [sculklatch mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/sculk-latch) with [HerrChaos](https://github.com/HerrChaos), [RedVortexDev](https://github.com/RedVortexDev), [TheTrueYak](https://github.com/TheTrueYak) and [unroman](https://github.com/unroman), who provided inspiration for this mod.**
